questions.q: According to a May 2026 Nanos poll, what do 3-in-4 young Canadians cite as a major problem affecting their day-to-day decisions?
A federal judge ruled that the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) acted unconstitutionally by using which AI tool to terminate humanities grants?
A May 2026 Nanos survey revealed that 8 out of 10 Canadians still support what action to strengthen the country's bargaining position in U.S. trade talks?
options: Applying a 10% tariff on U.S. imports

questions.q: On May 9, 2026, Power Integrations (POWI) reported Q1 earnings highlighting a 23% year-over-year revenue growth in which of its business segments?
According to a May 2026 Statistics Canada estimate, Ontario is expected to lose approximately what proportion of its international student population following the federal permit cap?
According to a May 2026 report, how many U.S. jurisdictions have blocked new AI data center builds amid growing opposition?
A Columbia University School of Nursing AI-assisted audit of nearly 3,000 peer-reviewed medical papers revealed what alarming trend?
options: The papers contained fake citations that do not exist
The studies falsified the ages of their human subjects
The papers were written entirely by artificial intelligence
The authors plagiarized Wikipedia articles word-for-word
questions.correctText: The papers contained fake citations that do not exist

questions.q: According to a May 8, 2026 announcement, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth launched a team of private sector negotiators to oversee defense contracts under what name?
In early May 2026, three men were charged in the United States with attempting to smuggle how many firearms into Canada?
An international study recently concluded that for the first time in human history, what demographic shift has occurred globally?
options: Men are less fertile than women
The global population has started shrinking
Women are retiring an average of five years later than men
Life expectancy for men has surpassed that of women
questions.correctText: Men are less fertile than women
